responsibilities: Select the smallest lens set that covers the target plan's risk.
Create and maintain review ledger state.
Set run_mode, run_scope, and execution_mode consistently before reviewers run.
Spawn or otherwise run independent lens reviewers with fresh context.
Ensure reviewer outputs are captured, terminal, and closed.
Reject lockable or completion claims when completion_validation has not passed.
Hand completed outputs to the synthesis owner.
Archive final review artifacts when the review is complete.
validation_rules: Every selected lens must map to a manifest in registry.json.
full run_mode requires fresh_spawned_lens_reviewers or fresh_spawned_orchestrator execution_mode.
inline and advisory run modes require manual_or_imported execution_mode.
Every active reviewer must report the current target_revision.
Every current review, synthesis, event, and completion artifact must report the ledger review_input_revision.
Completed spawned reviewers must have agent_id present, output_captured=true, and closed=true.
Completed detached orchestration must include events_path with orchestrator-owned reviewer_spawned, reviewer_completed, and reviewer_closed events for current reviewers.
Only full six_lens runs may claim unqualified LensTemper pass completion.
